member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.HasStateGraph
member.summary: Check if a GameObject or StateMachine has a StateGraph

member.name: P:Unity.VisualScripting.HasStateGraph.containerType
member.summary: The type of object that handles the graph.

member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.OnEnterState
member.summary: Called in flow graphs nested in state graphs when the parent state node is entered.

member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.AnyState
member.summary: A special state that can trigger transitions to other states, no matter which state is currently active. This state cannot receive transitions.

member.name: P:Unity.VisualScripting.StateUnit.start
member.summary: The entry point to start the state graph.

member.name: P:Unity.VisualScripting.StateUnit.stop
member.summary: The entry point to stop the state graph.

member.name: P:Unity.VisualScripting.StateUnit.started
member.summary: The action to execute after the state graph has been started.

member.name: P:Unity.VisualScripting.StateUnit.stopped
member.summary: The action to execute after the state graph has been stopped.

member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.TriggerStateTransition
member.summary: Triggers the transition in the parent state graph.

member.name: P:Unity.VisualScripting.TriggerStateTransition.trigger
member.summary: The moment at which the parent state transition should be triggered.

member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.GetStateGraphs
member.summary: Get a list of all the StateGraphs from a GameObject

member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.SetStateGraph
member.summary: Set a StateGraphAsset to a StateMachine

member.name: P:Unity.VisualScripting.SetStateGraph.containerType
member.summary: The type of object that handles the graph.

member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.OnExitState
member.summary: Called in flow graphs nested in state graphs before the parent state node is exited.

member.name: T:Unity.VisualScripting.GetStateGraph
member.summary: Get a StateGraphAsset from a GameObject
